english: What is the recommended number of sleep hours per night for an average adult in India?
hindi: भारत में एक औसत वयस्क के लिए प्रति रात कितने घंटे सोने की सलाह दी जाती है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் ஒரு சராசரி பெரியவருக்கு ஒரு இரவில் எத்தனை மணி நேரம் தூக்கம் புரிய வேண்டும்?
vietnamese: Số giờ ngủ khuyến nghị mỗi đêm cho một người trưởng thành trung bình ở Ấn Độ là bao nhiêu?
correct_answer: The recommended number of sleep hours per night for an average adult in India is 7-9 hours. This is similar to the recommended sleep hours in other parts of the world.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by providing an incorrect number of sleep hours, such as 4-6 hours, or by stating that the recommended sleep hours vary significantly in India compared to other countries.
bengali: ভারতের গড় বয়স্ক ব্যক্তির জন্য রাতের নিদ্রার পরিমাণ কত ঘন্টা হওয়া উচিত?
